mm1_0.1.2.description:
# New Features
* Enhanced Super Arm
  * When enabled, Super Arm can be used without needing to remove a block. This can allow weakness randomization to use Super Arm damage logically.
* Enhanced Hyper Bomb
  * When enabled, a second A press will detonate an active Hyper Bomb.

# Other Changes
* Moved rules to Rule Builder.
* Client is more resilient to collecting multiple consumable checks at once.

# Bug Fixes
* Fixed an issue where stage clear would not be set if the player did not collect any Bonus Balls.
* Fixed an issue where consumables did not have rules placed on them, at all.
* Fixed color compatibility with MM2 and MM3 (no longer reliant on load order).
* Fixed an issue where setting Fire Man's palette via palette_shuffle would corrupt the graphics of the fire in his stage.
* Fixed an issue where EnergyLink, despite being completely functional, did not appear in the template yaml or option creator.
* Fixed an issue where your last saved Wily stage would be the one you just completed.
mm1_0.1.2.title: Mega Man 1 APWorld v0.1.2
